reviews.comment:
Excelente el lugar y su gente,
Pasamos dos noches allí con la mh. Un lugar hermoso, limpio y bien cuidado.
Para destacar la cordialidad de los playeros, las chicas del bar y Lucy...

(Translated by Google)
The place and the people were excellent. We spent two nights there with our mother. A beautiful, clean, and well-maintained place.
Special mentions to the friendliness of the beach attendants, the bar staff, and Lucy...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHaklyeWdRRRAB
